requestedOutcome: Implement P3 memory read Router + Context Weaver behavior
goal: Make memory reads question-aware and make prompt injection use ContextWeaver
successEvidence: Profile questions activate Correction/Profile/Short Window without broad episodic memories
Business questions activate Business Document and relevant episodic support
General chat keeps short window plus correction guardrails
ContextWeaver emits ordered zones and enforces budget
Chat and Agent prompt construction use ContextWeaverPort
stopCondition: Stop when targeted P3 tests and package compile pass, or when live infrastructure is required.
nonGoals: P6 metrics and dynamic policy config
scope: kernel memory router, context weaver, chat response prompt injection, agent prompt injection, Spring wiring, tests
riskHints: Router over-filtering could hide useful memory
Budget enforcement must preserve correction/profile priority
